summary: Completed e2e testing of Loop Insights admin panel at /internal/loop-insights. All 8 backend API tests passed. All 7 frontend feature tests passed. No issues found.
critical_code_review_comments: PASS: GET /api/analytics/admin/loop-metrics returns 403 for athlete role
PASS: GET /api/analytics/admin/loop-metrics returns 200 for director role
PASS: Response structure includes all required sections: funnel, sources, trust, reinforcement, recap, daily_trend, unique_users
PASS: All 5 sections display: Core Loop Funnel, Source Comparison, Trust & Explainability, Reinforcement Effectiveness, Activity Trend
PASS: Period toggle (7d/14d/30d) changes data fetched
PASS: Route /internal/loop-insights redirects athlete to /board (proper route protection)
PASS: Design is calm, premium, compact cards with good contrast
context_for_next_testing_agent: Loop Insights admin panel fully functional. Backend endpoint /api/analytics/admin/loop-metrics aggregates ALL user events (unlike /loop-metrics which filters by user_id). Frontend at /internal/loop-insights protected by ProtectedRoute with allowedRoles=['director','platform_admin']. Test data exists: 29 events, 10 hero_views, 4 hero_clicks, 40% click rate.

verified_features.3_admin_endpoint_200_director: PASS - Director gets 200 with full metrics
verified_features.7_response_structure: PASS - Contains funnel, sources, trust, reinforcement, recap, daily_trend, unique_users
